MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-29-2012 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF ALLA ESAULTSEVA'S NOTICE OF HEARING TO VACATE ORDER OF PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED BY DEFENDANT. THE COURT NOTES THAT PLAINTIFF'S FORMER COUNSEL DID SUBMIT AN OPPOSITION, HOWEVER, THE COURT FINDS THAT SHE HAS NO STANDING TO CONTEST THIS MOTION. PLAINTIFF HAS MADE A DECISION TO WAIVE THE SANCTIONS AWARD APPARENTLY TO FACILITATE SETTLEMENT, AND IT IS NOT HER FORMER COUNSEL'S PLACE TO OBJECT TO THAT DECISION. WHILE PLAINTIFF MAY OWE HER FORMER COUNSEL OUTSTANDING FEES, THE APPROPRIATE VENUE FOR RECOVERY IS VIA A SEPARATE ACTION (PERHAPS IN SMALL CLAIMS COURT SINCE THE AMOUNT AT ISSUE IS APPROXIMATELY $1,000), NOT THROUGH AN ORDER FOR SANCTIONS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. DAVID MCDONALD, JUDGE PRO-TEM, NOT REPORTED.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2012 Set For Order To Show Cause On Sep-18-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Hearingto Vacate Order Of Pltf
Off Calendar Jun-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF ALLA ESAULTSEVA'S Notice Of Hearing to Vacate Order Of Plaintiff is Granted. No opposition filed by Defendant. The Court notes that Plaintiff's former counsel did submit an opposition, however, the Court finds that she has no standing to contest this motion. Plaintiff has made a decision to waive the sanctions award apparently to facilitate settlement, and it is not her former counsel's place to object to that decision. While Plaintiff may owe her former counsel outstanding fees, the appropriate venue for recovery is via a separate action (perhaps in Small Claims court since the amount at issue is approximately $1,000), not through an order for sanctions. Prevailing party to prepare order. David Mcdonald, Judge Pro-tem, Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2012 Continued To Aug-01-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
